executive_summary: The report highlights user frustrations and appreciations with Spotify's functionality and features, driven by technical issues, algorithmic limitations, and pricing concerns. Users struggle with music discovery due to behavioral, emotional, and product limitations. The app's ability to introduce new music is impacted by user preferences for familiarity and discovery challenges. Overall, user satisfaction and loyalty are influenced by the app's ability to fulfill emotional jobs and meet user needs.

key_findings.title: Discovery Challenges
key_findings.description: Users struggle to discover new music due to the vast library and dissatisfaction with recommendation algorithms.

key_findings.title: Repetitive Recommendations
key_findings.description: Users experience frustration with repetitive recommendations, citing a lack of diversity in suggested music.

key_findings.title: Technical Issues
key_findings.description: Technical problems, such as app crashes and ad frequency, negatively impact user experience and drive consideration of alternative platforms.

key_findings.title: Emotional Jobs
key_findings.description: Users seek Spotify for emotional connection, relaxation, focus, and motivation, influencing their satisfaction and loyalty.

key_findings.title: User Needs
key_findings.description: Users have unmet needs for control, personalization, variety, trust, and convenience, which affect their engagement and loyalty.

representative_quotes.quote: I'm tired of the same recommendations, I want to discover new music.
The ads are annoying, I'm considering upgrading to premium.
I love the music selection, but the app crashes too often.
I wish I had more control over my playlists and recommendations.
I'm disappointed with the lack of diversity in the suggested music.

discovery_problems.title: Overwhelming Library
discovery_problems.description: Users feel overwhelmed by the vast music library, making it difficult to discover new music.

discovery_problems.title: Poor Recommendations
discovery_problems.description: Users are dissatisfied with the recommendation algorithms, citing a lack of diversity and repetition.

discovery_problems.title: Limited Discovery Features
discovery_problems.description: Users want more features and tools to help them discover new music and artists.

discovery_problems.title: Familiarity Over Exploration
discovery_problems.description: Users often prefer familiar music, reducing the app's ability to introduce them to new artists and genres.

discovery_problems.title: Discovery Suppression
discovery_problems.description: Certain situations, such as stress or time pressure, suppress users' willingness to discover new music.

user_segments.title: New Users
user_segments.description: New users struggle with navigation and discovering features, requiring a more intuitive onboarding experience.

user_segments.title: Power Users
user_segments.description: Power users seek more control and diversity in their music experience, wanting advanced features and personalized recommendations.

user_segments.title: Free Users
user_segments.description: Free users are limited by ads and skips, driving consideration of premium upgrades for a better experience.

user_segments.title: Premium Users
user_segments.description: Premium users expect high-quality recommendations, features, and a seamless experience, with high standards for the app's performance.

user_segments.title: Casual Listeners
user_segments.description: Casual listeners prefer a simple and easy-to-use experience, focusing on familiar music and playlists.

unmet_needs.title: Control and Personalization
unmet_needs.description: Users want more control over their playlists and recommendations, seeking a personalized music experience.

unmet_needs.title: Diversity and Discovery
unmet_needs.description: Users desire more diverse music suggestions and discovery features to help them find new artists and genres.

unmet_needs.title: Trust and Convenience
unmet_needs.description: Users need a trustworthy algorithm and a convenient, ad-free experience, valuing ease of use and reliability.

unmet_needs.title: Emotional Connection
unmet_needs.description: Users seek an emotional connection with the music, wanting Spotify to understand and fulfill their emotional needs.

unmet_needs.title: Community and Sharing
unmet_needs.description: Users want to share and discover music with others, desiring social features and community engagement.

listening_behaviors.title: Background Listening
listening_behaviors.description: Users often listen to music in the background, seeking a relaxing and focus-enhancing experience.

listening_behaviors.title: Active Discovery
listening_behaviors.description: Users actively seek out new music and artists, using features like Discover Weekly and Release Radar.

listening_behaviors.title: Mood-Based Listening
listening_behaviors.description: Users listen to music based on their mood, selecting playlists and genres that match their emotional state.

listening_behaviors.title: Playlist Creation
listening_behaviors.description: Users create and curate playlists, expressing their personal taste and preferences through music.

listening_behaviors.title: Commute and Workout Listening
listening_behaviors.description: Users listen to music during commutes and workouts, seeking energizing and motivating playlists.
